name: Spinach with Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the spinach thoroughly.
2. Place the spinach in the top of a double boiler and heat until wilted.
3. Drain the spinach and chop coarsely.
4. Melt the margarine in a skillet.
5. Add the onion to the skillet.
6. Saute the onion over high heat until it is brown on the edges.
7. Add the seasonings (nutmeg, thyme, salt, and pepper) to the sautéed onions.
8. Stir to blend the ingredients.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 37
